ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent for the clothing item */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size equivalent for the clothing item */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size equivalent for the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being measured */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length in cm (for tops) */,
  "pants_length" REAL /* Pants length in cm (for bottoms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Women's, Men's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_image" TEXT /* URL of the brand image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being logged */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., restock, sale) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the transaction occurred */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, sales associate) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order it belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the product return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)
